'''''Star Wars'' 1''' is the first issue in the ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' series of comics. It was published on [[December 16]], [[1998]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]].

==Publisher's summary==
''Ki-Adi-Mundi is a Jedi Knight of formidable power and influence, but not on his own homeworld of Cerea. Most of the planet's citizens are happy to continue their low-tech lives of simplicity, isolated from the Republic, but a new generation of Cereans crave speeder bikes and starships, and are prepared to fight their elders for them! How can a Jedi take up arms against his own children?''

==Plot summary==
Meetings are taking place to bring Cerea into the Republic. In exchange for access to Cerea's resources, the Republic representative promises technology. While the Elders wish to keep their low-tech lives, most of the younger generation, led by offworlder politician [[Bron (Human)|Bron]] wish to be brought up to speed with the rest of the galaxy. During a pro-tech rally, a misunderstanding causes Ki-Adi-Mundi to be accused of murder. Meanwhile, the [[Chevin/Legends|Chevin]] smuggler [[Ephant Mon/Legends|Ephant Mon]] has begun scouting resources on the idyllic world.
